home.hero_title: Building financial and digital infrastructure for emerging markets
home.hero_subtitle: Digitalizing the informal economy and including MSMEs.

about.title: One continent, one digital infrastructure
about.subtitle: Our Mission
about.description: Digitalizing and financially including MSMEs in sub-Saharan Africa. Connecting the informal economy to 21st-century tools.
about.history_desc: Born from a hackathon, ALODO TECH has become an ambitious startup dedicated to the continent's digital transformation.
about.team_desc: A passionate team united to build the future of African fintech.
about.hire_desc: We are always looking for talent to digitalize Africa.

products.alodo_desc: A smart box and a WhatsApp bot to digitalize MSME transactions.
products.coinai_desc: Artificial intelligence at the service of finance in emerging markets.

services_page.title: Our B2B Solutions
services_page.service1_desc: Full digitalization of accounting and access to credit.
services_page.service2_desc: Scoring API based on real field data.
services_page.service3_desc: Financial inclusion policy tools and macro data.
services_page.service5_desc: Interface accessible without a high-end smartphone.
services_page.service6_desc: Reliable alternative for the informal segment.
